means.mean: đề cập đến một chủ đề nào đó, bắt đầu nói về chuyện gì
means.example: Why did you have to bring up his ex-girlfriend at the party?

means.mean: nuôi nấng, dạy dỗ trẻ em
means.example: She was brought up by her grandparents.

means.mean: bị hỏng (máy móc), suy sụp (tinh thần)
means.example: The car broke down in the middle of the highway.

means.mean: mong đợi, háo hức chờ đợi (thường + V-ing/Noun)
means.example: I'm really looking forward to seeing you next week.
She is looking after her younger brother while her parents are away.
He has always looked up to his older brother.

means.mean: trì hoãn, hoãn lại một việc gì đó
means.example: We had to put off the meeting until tomorrow because of the rain.
I can't put up with his constant complaining anymore.
They had to call off the football match due to bad weather.

means.mean: tình cờ gặp, tình cờ thấy
means.example: I came across an old photo while cleaning the attic.

means.mean: tìm hiểu, khám phá ra thông tin
means.example: I need to find out what time the train leaves.

means.mean: hòa hợp, thân thiện với ai
means.example: I get along very well with my new neighbors.
He decided to give up smoking for his health.
